name: Lou Ann Everett
bio: Lou Ann Everett serves as the Mayor of Canton, the county seat of Van Zandt County and home to First Monday Trade Days, the oldest and largest flea market in the United States. The mayor works with the city council to manage the unique demands of hosting this major monthly event while serving the everyday needs of residents.
campaignPromises: Support First Monday Trade Days as Canton's economic engine
Improve city infrastructure strained by monthly events
Maintain public safety during high-traffic weekends
Promote Canton as a year-round destination
Keep property taxes low for permanent residents
